summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters interconnecting with US electric power systems must comply with IEEE 1547-2018 (Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces). IEEE 1547-2018 superseded the 2003 edition and introduced mandatory voltage and frequency ride-through categories (Category I/II/III), reactive power capability, voltage regulation participation, and enhanced anti-islanding requirements. Conformance testing is specified in IEEE 1547.1-2020. Utilities and state/AHJ authorities layer additional interconnection agreement requirements on top of IEEE 1547; UL 1741 (Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources) and its Supplement B (UL 1741 SB) provide the product-level certification pathway for grid-support functions in states such as California (Rule 21) and Hawaii.
summary.zh: 接入美国电力系统的光伏并网逆变器须符合 IEEE 1547-2018（分布式能源与电力系统接口并网与互操作性标准）。该标准于2018年取代2003版，引入强制性电压/频率穿越类别（Category I/II/III）、无功功率能力、电压调节参与及增强防孤岛要求。合规测试由 IEEE 1547.1-2020 规定。公用事业公司及各州/地方权威机构（AHJ）在 IEEE 1547 基础上附加并网协议要求；UL 1741 及其附录 B（UL 1741 SB）为电网支撑功能提供产品级认证路径，适用于加利福尼亚州（Rule 21）及夏威夷等州。
summary.zht: 接入美國電力系統的光伏並網逆變器須符合 IEEE 1547-2018（分布式能源與電力系統接口並網與互操作性標準）。該標準於2018年取代2003版，引入強制性電壓/頻率穿越類別（Category I/II/III）、無功功率能力、電壓調節參與及增強防孤島要求。合規測試由 IEEE 1547.1-2020 規定。公用事業公司及各州/地方權威機構（AHJ）在 IEEE 1547 基礎上附加並網協議要求；UL 1741 及其附錄 B（UL 1741 SB）為電網支撐功能提供產品級認證路徑，適用於加利福尼亞州（Rule 21）及夏威夷等州。

summary.en: In China, PV power station grid connection is governed primarily by GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System), which sets system-level technical requirements. Inverter-level specifications are covered by NB/T 32004-2018 (Technical Specification of PV Grid-Connected Inverter). These standards are administered by the National Energy Administration (NEA) and State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) and are referenced in grid interconnection agreements issued by State Grid Corporation of China and China Southern Power Grid.
summary.zh: 中国光伏电站并网主要依据 GB/T 19964-2024（光伏电站接入电力系统技术规定），规定系统级技术要求。逆变器设备层面则依据 NB/T 32004-2018（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）。上述标准由国家能源局（NEA）和国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）管理，并被国家电网和南方电网的并网协议所引用。
summary.zht: 中國光伏電站並網主要依據 GB/T 19964-2024（光伏電站接入電力系統技術規定），規定系統級技術要求。逆變器設備層面則依據 NB/T 32004-2018（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）。上述標準由國家能源局（NEA）和國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）管理，並被國家電網和南方電網的並網協議所引用。

gap.en: IEEE 1547-2018 mandates specific ride-through categories (I/II/III) and reactive power curves that differ substantially from GB/T 19964 grid-code requirements. A product certified under Chinese standards must undergo new conformance testing per IEEE 1547.1-2020 at a NRTL-accredited laboratory to demonstrate compliance. Additionally, UL 1741 SB certification (for advanced grid-support / smart inverter functions) is separately required in California and Hawaii; no direct Chinese equivalent certification is recognised by US utilities.
gap.zh: IEEE 1547-2018 规定了与 GB/T 19964 电网规范存在显著差异的穿越类别（I/II/III）及无功功率曲线。按中国标准认证的产品须在 NRTL 认可实验室重新按照 IEEE 1547.1-2020 进行合规测试。此外，加利福尼亚州和夏威夷还单独要求 UL 1741 SB 认证（适用于高级电网支撑/智能逆变器功能）；美国公用事业公司不承认中国同类认证。
gap.zht: IEEE 1547-2018 規定了與 GB/T 19964 電網規範存在顯著差異的穿越類別（I/II/III）及無功功率曲線。按中國標準認證的產品須在 NRTL 認可實驗室重新按照 IEEE 1547.1-2020 進行合規測試。此外，加利福尼亞州和夏威夷還單獨要求 UL 1741 SB 認證（適用於高級電網支撐/智能逆變器功能）；美國公用事業公司不承認中國同類認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEEE 1547-2018 adoption is required by FERC Order 828 for utilities; state-level and utility interconnection agreements enforce conformance as a condition of grid connection. UL 1741 SB is mandatory in California (Rule 21) and Hawaii for smart-inverter functions.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 19964 and NB/T 32004 compliance is required by State Grid / Southern Power Grid interconnection agreements.

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese-certified PV inverters require full re-testing and certification to IEEE 1547-2018 / IEEE 1547.1-2020 and UL 1741 (SB where applicable) before US grid connection is permitted. Existing GB/T / NB/T certifications are not transferable to the US market. A utility interconnection agreement must also be executed with the local utility prior to connection.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国认证的光伏逆变器在获准接入美国电网之前，需按 IEEE 1547-2018 / IEEE 1547.1-2020 及 UL 1741（适用时含 UL 1741 SB）重新完成全套测试与认证。现有 GB/T / NB/T 认证证书不可直接用于美国市场。接入前还须与当地公用事业公司签署并网协议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國認證的光伏逆變器在獲准接入美國電網之前，需按 IEEE 1547-2018 / IEEE 1547.1-2020 及 UL 1741（適用時含 UL 1741 SB）重新完成全套測試與認證。現有 GB/T / NB/T 認證證書不可直接用於美國市場。接入前還須與當地公用事業公司簽署並網協議。

summary.en: IEEE 1547-2018 Section 6 defines mandatory voltage ride-through (VRT) and frequency ride-through (FRT) performance categories. Category I (default) requires the inverter to remain connected and continue operating during specified over/under-voltage and over/under-frequency events with defined clearing time windows. Category II (more stringent, for critical infrastructure or utility-specified) and Category III (most stringent) require longer ride-through durations and tighter operating bands. The standard also mandates momentary cessation and trip settings, and prohibits unintentional islanding. Specific trip settings (e.g., voltage ±10–20%, frequency 57–60.5 Hz nominal for 60 Hz grid) and clearing times are tabulated in the standard.
summary.zh: IEEE 1547-2018 第6节规定了强制性电压穿越（VRT）和频率穿越（FRT）性能类别。默认的 Category I 要求逆变器在规定的过/欠电压及过/欠频率事件期间保持并网运行，具备规定的切除时间窗口。Category II（适用于关键基础设施或公用事业指定场景）和 Category III（最严格）要求更长的穿越持续时间和更紧的运行区间。标准还规定了瞬时停止和跳闸设置，并禁止非计划孤岛运行。具体跳闸设置（例如电压 ±10–20%，60 Hz 电网标称频率范围57–60.5 Hz）及切除时间均列于标准表格中。
summary.zht: IEEE 1547-2018 第6節規定了強制性電壓穿越（VRT）和頻率穿越（FRT）性能類別。默認的 Category I 要求逆變器在規定的過/欠電壓及過/欠頻率事件期間保持並網運行，具備規定的切除時間窗口。Category II（適用於關鍵基礎設施或公用事業指定場景）和 Category III（最嚴格）要求更長的穿越持續時間和更緊的運行區間。標準還規定了瞬時停止和跳閘設置，並禁止非計劃孤島運行。具體跳閘設置（例如電壓 ±10–20%，60 Hz 電網標稱頻率範圍57–60.5 Hz）及切除時間均列於標準表格中。

summary.en: GB/T 19964-2024 specifies low-voltage ride-through (LVRT) and high-voltage ride-through (HVRT) requirements for PV power stations on the 50 Hz Chinese grid. The ride-through voltage-time profile and reactive current injection requirements during faults differ from IEEE 1547 Category definitions. NB/T 32004-2018 specifies inverter-level LVRT capability. The Chinese grid operates at 50 Hz with voltage levels and fault profiles distinct from the North American 60 Hz system, making direct parameter transfer impossible without re-testing. [UNVERIFIED: exact HVRT thresholds in GB/T 19964-2024 vs 2012 edition changes]
summary.zh: GB/T 19964-2024 规定了50 Hz中国电网光伏电站的低电压穿越（LVRT）和高电压穿越（HVRT）要求。故障期间的穿越电压-时间曲线及无功电流注入要求与 IEEE 1547 类别定义存在差异。NB/T 32004-2018 规定了逆变器级别的 LVRT 能力。中国电网运行在50 Hz，电压等级和故障特性与北美60 Hz系统截然不同，参数无法直接移植，必须重新测试。[UNVERIFIED: GB/T 19964-2024 相比2012版 HVRT 阈值的具体变化]
summary.zht: GB/T 19964-2024 規定了50 Hz中國電網光伏電站的低電壓穿越（LVRT）和高電壓穿越（HVRT）要求。故障期間的穿越電壓-時間曲線及無功電流注入要求與 IEEE 1547 類別定義存在差異。NB/T 32004-2018 規定了逆變器級別的 LVRT 能力。中國電網運行在50 Hz，電壓等級和故障特性與北美60 Hz系統截然不同，參數無法直接移植，必須重新測試。[UNVERIFIED: GB/T 19964-2024 相比2012版 HVRT 閾值的具體變化]

gap.en: The ride-through category structure (I/II/III) and associated voltage/frequency bands in IEEE 1547-2018 have no direct equivalent in the Chinese grid codes. The Chinese 50 Hz grid system parameters (voltage levels, fault current profiles, reactive injection curves) differ from the US 60 Hz system, meaning all VRT/FRT parameters must be re-verified via IEEE 1547.1-2020 tests. Software/firmware updates to trip settings are typically required; hardware modifications may also be needed if the inverter's grid-forming control loop was tuned for 50 Hz operation.
gap.zh: IEEE 1547-2018 的穿越类别结构（I/II/III）及相关电压/频率区间在中国电网规范中没有直接对应项。中国50 Hz电网系统参数（电压等级、短路电流特性、无功注入曲线）与美国60 Hz系统不同，所有 VRT/FRT 参数均须通过 IEEE 1547.1-2020 测试重新验证。通常需要软件/固件更新跳闸设置；若逆变器并网控制回路针对50 Hz进行了调谐，还可能需要硬件改动。
gap.zht: IEEE 1547-2018 的穿越類別結構（I/II/III）及相關電壓/頻率區間在中國電網規範中沒有直接對應項。中國50 Hz電網系統參數（電壓等級、短路電流特性、無功注入曲線）與美國60 Hz系統不同，所有 VRT/FRT 參數均須通過 IEEE 1547.1-2020 測試重新驗證。通常需要軟件/固件更新跳閘設置；若逆變器並網控制回路針對50 Hz進行了調諧，還可能需要硬件改動。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEEE 1547-2018 ride-through categories are enforced via utility interconnection agreements and state interconnection rules.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — LVRT/HVRT compliance required by GB/T 19964 and enforced by State Grid / Southern Power Grid interconnection procedures.

compliance_verdict.en: Ride-through parameters certified under Chinese grid codes are not accepted for US interconnection. Full VRT/FRT conformance testing per IEEE 1547.1-2020 is required, and inverter firmware/hardware may need modification to meet 60 Hz US grid ride-through profiles. This is typically one of the most significant technical gaps for Chinese-made inverters entering the US market.
compliance_verdict.zh: 按中国电网规范认证的穿越参数不被美国并网所接受。须按 IEEE 1547.1-2020 进行完整的 VRT/FRT 合规测试，逆变器固件/硬件可能需要改动以满足美国60 Hz电网穿越要求。这通常是中国制造逆变器进入美国市场的最主要技术差距之一。
compliance_verdict.zht: 按中國電網規範認證的穿越參數不被美國並網所接受。須按 IEEE 1547.1-2020 進行完整的 VRT/FRT 合規測試，逆變器固件/硬件可能需要改動以滿足美國60 Hz電網穿越要求。這通常是中國製造逆變器進入美國市場的最主要技術差距之一。

summary.en: IEEE 1547-2018 Section 8.7 requires all grid-tied inverters to detect and cease energising an unintentional island within 2 seconds of island formation. The standard mandates both passive and, where required by the utility, active anti-islanding detection methods. IEEE 1547.1-2020 specifies the conformance test procedure, including the loss-of-mains (LOM) test using a resonant RLC load. UL 1741 certifies anti-islanding performance at the product level. Intentional islanding (microgrid operation) is addressed separately and requires explicit utility agreement.
summary.zh: IEEE 1547-2018 第8.7节要求所有并网逆变器在孤岛形成后2秒内检测到非计划孤岛并停止向其供电。标准要求采用被动及（公用事业要求时）主动防孤岛检测方法。IEEE 1547.1-2020 规定了合规测试程序，包括使用谐振 RLC 负载的失电（LOM）测试。UL 1741 在产品层面认证防孤岛性能。有意孤岛运行（微电网模式）需另行处理，并须获得公用事业公司明确同意。
summary.zht: IEEE 1547-2018 第8.7節要求所有並網逆變器在孤島形成後2秒內檢測到非計劃孤島並停止向其供電。標準要求採用被動及（公用事業要求時）主動防孤島檢測方法。IEEE 1547.1-2020 規定了合規測試程序，包括使用諧振 RLC 負載的失電（LOM）測試。UL 1741 在產品層面認證防孤島性能。有意孤島運行（微電網模式）需另行處理，並須獲得公用事業公司明確同意。

summary.en: NB/T 32004-2018 Section 5 specifies anti-islanding requirements for PV grid-connected inverters in China, including passive detection (over/under-voltage and frequency relays) and active detection methods (e.g., active frequency drift). The detection time requirement under Chinese standards is generally 2 seconds for passive methods, consistent with IEEE 1547 in principle, but the specific test circuit, load conditions, and pass/fail criteria differ from IEEE 1547.1-2020. Chinese certification is conducted by accredited domestic labs; results are not mutually recognised by US NRTLs. [UNVERIFIED: whether NB/T 32004-2018 specifies an RLC load test equivalent to IEEE 1547.1]
summary.zh: NB/T 32004-2018 第5章规定了中国光伏并网逆变器的防孤岛要求，包括被动检测（过/欠压和频率继电器）和主动检测方法（如主动频率偏移）。中国标准对被动方式的检测时间要求通常为2秒，原则上与 IEEE 1547 一致，但具体测试电路、负载条件及合格判定准则与 IEEE 1547.1-2020 有所不同。中国认证由国内认可实验室进行，结果不被美国 NRTL 相互认可。[UNVERIFIED: NB/T 32004-2018 是否规定了与 IEEE 1547.1 等效的 RLC 负载测试]
summary.zht: NB/T 32004-2018 第5章規定了中國光伏並網逆變器的防孤島要求，包括被動檢測（過/欠壓和頻率繼電器）和主動檢測方法（如主動頻率偏移）。中國標準對被動方式的檢測時間要求通常為2秒，原則上與 IEEE 1547 一致，但具體測試電路、負載條件及合格判定準則與 IEEE 1547.1-2020 有所不同。中國認證由國內認可實驗室進行，結果不被美國 NRTL 相互認可。[UNVERIFIED: NB/T 32004-2018 是否規定了與 IEEE 1547.1 等效的 RLC 負載測試]

gap.en: Although both systems require anti-islanding within ~2 seconds, the test methodologies differ. IEEE 1547.1-2020 prescribes a specific resonant RLC load test circuit that must be passed at an NRTL-accredited US lab; Chinese lab test results under NB/T 32004 are not recognised. Active anti-islanding algorithms validated for the Chinese 50 Hz grid may also behave differently on the US 60 Hz grid, requiring re-validation. UL 1741 listing is a separate product safety certification step that has no Chinese equivalent accepted by US utilities.
gap.zh: 尽管两套体系均要求约2秒内完成防孤岛，但测试方法有所不同。IEEE 1547.1-2020 规定了须在美国 NRTL 认可实验室通过的特定谐振 RLC 负载测试电路；NB/T 32004 下中国实验室的测试结果不被认可。针对中国50 Hz电网验证的主动防孤岛算法在美国60 Hz电网上的表现可能存在差异，需重新验证。UL 1741 认证是独立的产品安全认证环节，美国公用事业公司不接受任何中国同等认证。
gap.zht: 儘管兩套體系均要求約2秒內完成防孤島，但測試方法有所不同。IEEE 1547.1-2020 規定了須在美國 NRTL 認可實驗室通過的特定諧振 RLC 負載測試電路；NB/T 32004 下中國實驗室的測試結果不被認可。針對中國50 Hz電網驗證的主動防孤島算法在美國60 Hz電網上的表現可能存在差異，需重新驗證。UL 1741 認證是獨立的產品安全認證環節，美國公用事業公司不接受任何中國同等認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — anti-islanding is a non-negotiable safety requirement under IEEE 1547-2018 and UL 1741 for all US grid-tied inverters.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — anti-islanding required by NB/T 32004-2018 for all PV grid-connected inverters in China.

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese anti-islanding certification does not satisfy US requirements. Re-testing per IEEE 1547.1-2020 at a US NRTL lab and UL 1741 listing are required. Algorithm re-validation for 60 Hz operation is advisable even if the 2-second target is nominally met under Chinese testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国防孤岛认证不满足美国要求。须在美国 NRTL 实验室按照 IEEE 1547.1-2020 重新测试并获得 UL 1741 认证。即使在中国测试中名义上满足2秒要求，也建议对60 Hz运行的算法进行重新验证。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國防孤島認證不滿足美國要求。須在美國 NRTL 實驗室按照 IEEE 1547.1-2020 重新測試並獲得 UL 1741 認證。即使在中國測試中名義上滿足2秒要求，也建議對60 Hz運行的算法進行重新驗證。

requirement_topic.zh: 公用事业并网协议与州/地方权威机构审批
requirement_topic.zht: 公用事業並網協議與州/地方權威機構審批

summary.en: Beyond equipment certification, connecting a PV system to the US grid requires execution of a formal Interconnection Agreement with the local utility (distribution-level) or ISO/RTO (transmission-level). FERC's Small Generator Interconnection Procedures (SGIP) and Large Generator Interconnection Procedures (LGIP) provide federal templates; states adopt their own rules (e.g., California's Rule 21 administered by CPUC, which also mandates UL 1741 SB for smart-inverter functions). Hawaii's Rule 14H (HECO) similarly mandates IEEE 1547-2018 and UL 1741 SB. The interconnection process typically includes an application, technical review, interconnection study (for larger systems), and approval before energisation. Time to approval varies from weeks (small residential) to years (large utility-scale).
summary.zh: 除设备认证外，将光伏系统接入美国电网还须与当地公用事业公司（配电层面）或 ISO/RTO（输电层面）签署正式并网协议。FERC 的小型发电机并网程序（SGIP）和大型发电机并网程序（LGIP）提供联邦级模板；各州制定自己的规则（例如加利福尼亚州由 CPUC 管理的 Rule 21，该规则还要求智能逆变器功能须获 UL 1741 SB 认证）。夏威夷 Rule 14H（HECO）同样要求符合 IEEE 1547-2018 和 UL 1741 SB。并网流程通常包括申请、技术审查、并网研究（较大系统）和通电前审批。审批周期从数周（小型住宅）到数年（大型公用事业规模）不等。
summary.zht: 除設備認證外，將光伏系統接入美國電網還須與當地公用事業公司（配電層面）或 ISO/RTO（輸電層面）簽署正式並網協議。FERC 的小型發電機並網程序（SGIP）和大型發電機並網程序（LGIP）提供聯邦級模板；各州制定自己的規則（例如加利福尼亞州由 CPUC 管理的 Rule 21，該規則還要求智能逆變器功能須獲 UL 1741 SB 認證）。夏威夷 Rule 14H（HECO）同樣要求符合 IEEE 1547-2018 和 UL 1741 SB。並網流程通常包括申請、技術審查、並網研究（較大系統）和通電前審批。審批周期從數週（小型住宅）到數年（大型公用事業規模）不等。

standards_or_laws: FERC Order 2003 / SGIP (18 CFR Part 35) [UNVERIFIED exact current CFR citation]
Hawaii Rule 14H (HECO) [UNVERIFIED exact current rule designation]

summary.en: In China, grid interconnection for PV projects requires submission of a grid connection application to the provincial grid company (State Grid or Southern Power Grid), followed by a grid access study, signing of a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) and Grid Connection Agreement, and final acceptance inspection. The process is governed by State Grid's enterprise standards and NEA administrative procedures. There is no independent public utility commission equivalent; the grid company controls both the technical standard and the commercial approval process.
summary.zh: 在中国，光伏项目并网须向省级电网公司（国家电网或南方电网）提交并网申请，经电网接入研究、签署购电协议（PPA）和并网协议，并通过最终验收检查。该流程由国家电网企业标准和国家能源局行政程序规范。中国没有独立的公用事业委员会对应机构；电网公司同时掌控技术标准和商业审批流程。
summary.zht: 在中國，光伏項目並網須向省級電網公司（國家電網或南方電網）提交並網申請，經電網接入研究、簽署購電協議（PPA）和並網協議，並通過最終驗收檢查。該流程由國家電網企業標準和國家能源局行政程序規範。中國沒有獨立的公用事業委員會對應機構；電網公司同時掌控技術標準和商業審批流程。

standards_or_laws: NEA Administrative Measures for Grid Connection of Renewable Energy (国家能源局可再生能源并网管理办法) [UNVERIFIED exact current title/year]
State Grid Corporation Enterprise Standard Q/GDW series [UNVERIFIED specific standard numbers]

gap.en: The US requires a utility-specific interconnection agreement executed before energisation, with technical requirements that vary by state and utility. Chinese grid connection approvals and agreements have no standing in the US regulatory process. For utility-scale projects, FERC-jurisdictional interconnection studies (queue position, network upgrade costs) represent a significant additional regulatory burden with no Chinese equivalent. State-specific mandates such as California Rule 21 add further requirements (UL 1741 SB) beyond the base IEEE 1547 standard.
gap.zh: 美国要求在通电前签署针对具体公用事业公司的并网协议，技术要求因州和公用事业公司而异。中国的并网审批和协议在美国监管程序中不具效力。对于公用事业规模项目，受 FERC 管辖的并网研究（队列位置、网络升级费用）构成中国没有对应项的重大额外监管负担。加利福尼亚州 Rule 21 等州级强制要求在 IEEE 1547 基础标准之外增加了 UL 1741 SB 等进一步要求。
gap.zht: 美國要求在通電前簽署針對具體公用事業公司的並網協議，技術要求因州和公用事業公司而異。中國的並網審批和協議在美國監管程序中不具效力。對於公用事業規模項目，受 FERC 管轄的並網研究（隊列位置、網絡升級費用）構成中國沒有對應項的重大額外監管負擔。加利福尼亞州 Rule 21 等州級強制要求在 IEEE 1547 基礎標準之外增加了 UL 1741 SB 等進一步要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — no PV system may be energised and connected to the US grid without a signed utility interconnection agreement and applicable state/AHJ approvals.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — grid connection approval from the provincial grid company is required before any PV system can be energised in China.

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese grid connection approvals and agreements provide no regulatory standing in the US. Manufacturers and project developers must independently navigate the US utility interconnection process at the federal (FERC), state (PUC/PSC), and utility level. Equipment must carry valid IEEE 1547-2018 / UL 1741 certification before a utility will accept an interconnection application in most jurisdictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国并网审批和协议在美国不具监管效力。制造商和项目开发商须独立应对联邦（FERC）、州（PUC/PSC）和公用事业公司层面的美国并网程序。在大多数司法管辖区，设备须持有有效的 IEEE 1547-2018 / UL 1741 认证，公用事业公司才会受理并网申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國並網審批和協議在美國不具監管效力。製造商和項目開發商須獨立應對聯邦（FERC）、州（PUC/PSC）和公用事業公司層面的美國並網程序。在大多數司法管轄區，設備須持有有效的 IEEE 1547-2018 / UL 1741 認證，公用事業公司才會受理並網申請。
